rag_rules: Generate assume and guarantee clauses only for data constraints with visible identifiers and explicit bounds.
Place component-type contracts in type annexes; use implementation annexes only for assign statements when binding subcomponent outputs.
generic_rules: Use only AADL-visible features or locally declared eq/const helpers in AGREE expressions.
Ensure logical expressions use AGREE-native operators: and, or, not, =>, and temporal patterns like pre().
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE clauses must be inside annex agree {** ... **}; with correct punctuation: colon after label, semicolon after expression.
Declare helper variables with eq name : bool/int/real = expression; to simplify complex conditions.
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL properties (e.g., Period, Deadline) as if they are AGREE variables.
Never place guarantee statements in implementation annexes; use assign for implementation-level bindings instead.
